description:
Auto-generate structured meeting summaries using customizable templates (e.g., standup, retrospective, sales call). Allow users to define which fields to extract per meeting type.

**Rationale:** Different meeting types require different output formats. One-size summaries waste time as users manually reformat content for stakeholders or CRMs.
title: AI-Powered Meeting Summaries with Templates
